text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hey, c'mere a sec! We gotta talk!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Whaddya playin' at with my juniors, huh?! Sweet talkin' 'em 'n all that!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: ...The hell are you going on about?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Don't play dense with me! I got the proof right
here!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I know you've been playin' hooky lately. I got these younger juniors I'm worried 'bout, but when I asked what was troublin' 'em...

text_block_list.name: Younger Student A
text_block_list.text: Mamo. It's in to be an outlaw right now.

text_block_list.name: Younger Student B
text_block_list.text:
Doin' the set training at the set time... Pft! If
that's all it takes to win, we're gonna have no
trouble!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Once I got to the bottom of things, I found out they learned that kinda behavior from watchin' you!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Don't put this on me. It's you that didn't mentor
them properly.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Nah, this is on you for settin' a bad example. They won't listen to a word I say! Now go tell 'em ditchin' isn't cool!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: I might consider it, depending how well you beg.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ugh! Why, you...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Who's asking who for a favor, again? If you want
something, you've at least got to ask for it nicely.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...Ngh.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Whatever. I don't gotta win you over. I'd be
better off goin' to the student council for help.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I know Rudolf would be happy to hear me out,
and she'd definitely come up with a better
solution than you could.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Tch! Hey, wait!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huh, what's wrong? Changed your mind?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: ...If you're looking at having her come over to "negotiate," that changes things.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Let's settle this with a contest. If you win, I'll tell
your junior buddies to behave.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...Fine by me. Not like I plan on losin'.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So how are we doin' this? Race, anythin'—you
name it, I'm game!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
As am I. Hey, you. Yes, the trainer. Give us
something to work with.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Pressured to come up with an idea, the first thing
that comes to mind is...
choice_data_list:
A stunt showdown! Bust moves until you run out
of ideas!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Man, that's so simple! But whatever, count me in!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
All right, we're all set to go. Loser gets a li'l bonk
on the head with this toy hammer. Remember, ya
only get one shot!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: I'd be fine with best out of three.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Nah, don't be silly, an Umamusume never backs
down on her word! Rock, paper, scissors, shoot!

text_block_list.name: Sirius and Tamamo
text_block_list.text: Hah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Squeak!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: All right! Ya better keep yer word, Sirius!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
...Hmph. I'm starting to see why they call you
White Lightning.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I later hear that Tamamo Cross's juniors have
gone back to their usual, obedient selves.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
A contest to see who can keep doin' stunts the
longest?! Works for me, but... are you game,
Sirius?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Stunts, you say?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The moment I start to wonder if Sirius Symboli has
just moved closer to Tamamo Cross...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Wha?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She performs a clean roundhouse kick over
Tamamo Cross's head.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Heh. Don't get all frightened. It's just a stunt.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
A-as if! Just you watch—I can do a kick like that,
easy!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You'll never able to get your leg over my
head. I win, simple as that.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I can too! Get back here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While the contest doesn't quite go as planned...
Apparently, Tamamo Cross's juniors end up
reverting to their usual, polite selves.
